questions.prompt: The mailman left a ____ at the front door this morning.
questions.explain: 郵差送來的是「包裹」，所以選 package。

questions.prompt: The dog ____ to the hospital after the accident.
questions.explain: take 的過去分詞是 taken，所以被動過去式是 was taken。

questions.prompt: Many trees ____ in this park in the past two years.
questions.explain: 表示「過去兩年已經被種下很多樹」，要用現在完成式被動 have been planted。

questions.prompt: You may sit on ____ side of the table. Both seats are fine.
questions.explain: 兩者之中「任一邊都可以」要用 either。

questions.prompt: My grandmother takes care ____ my little cousin after school.
questions.explain: take care of 是固定片語，表示「照顧」。

questions.prompt: I checked both answers, but ____ of them was right.
questions.explain: 兩個答案都不對，要用 neither。

choices: Mina can dance, and so I can.
Mina can dance, and so can I.
Mina can dance, and I so can.
Mina can dance, and can so I.
questions.explain: so 放句首附和時，標準句型是 so + 助動詞 + 主詞。so I can 是忘記倒裝的典型錯誤。

questions.prompt: ____ she was walking home, it began to rain.
questions.explain: walking home 是持續中的動作，所以用 While。

questions.prompt: The team won three games in a ____, so everyone was excited.
questions.explain: in a row 是固定片語，表示「連續地」。

questions.prompt: That is the house ____ he grew up.
questions.explain: 「他在那棟房子裡長大」是地點概念，所以用 where。若改用 which，必須寫成 which he grew up in。
